Software Development

VIZON

Work from home
₹ 11,000 - 17,000 /month
3 Months
As a Software Development Intern at VIZON, you will have the opportunity to immerse yourself in the dynamic world of technology and contribute to cutting-edge projects. With your expertise in C++ Programming, Java, Python, and JavaScript, you will play a vital role in shaping VIZON's innovative software solutions. 1. Collaborate with the development team to design and implement software applications, ensuring they meet quality standards. 2. Participate in code reviews, providing valuable insights and suggestions to enhance the overall performance and maintainability of our software. 3. Assist in the documentation and testing of new features, ensuring they align with the project requirements and deliver exceptional user experiences. 4. Work closely with senior developers to troubleshoot and debug issues, contributing to a seamless and reliable software environment. 5. Stay up-to-date with the latest industry trends and emerging technologies, bringing fresh ideas and innovative solutions to the table. 6. Participate in team meetings and brainstorming sessions, fostering a collaborative and inclusive work culture. 7. Continuously learn and improve your technical skills, leveraging our supportive environment to enhance your overall professional growth. If you're eager to immerse yourself in a fast-paced and innovative environment, and ready to make a positive impact through your software development skills, then we can't wait to welcome you to our team at VIZON! You can visit our website https://vizon.tech to learn more. If you want to explore open-source projects, then check the club section of the website.

AI Automation & App Development

Weaving Vibes

Actively hiring
Bangalore
₹ 20,000 - 30,000 /month
6 Months
Limitless is a B2B AI venture building operating system for large enterprises that runs workflows and automates information, decision making and execution across systems. The problem statement is large and we have already onboarded some of the biggest players across infra, plastics, solar, etc. About the founders: 1. Pratik Gadia is a startup founder and angel investor. He built and scaled The Yarn Bazaar (seen on Shark Tank India), India’s leading B2B textile platforms, raised venture capital, and spent 6+ years building deep operating experience across manufacturing, trading, and supply chains. 2. Naga was part of the founding teams of two US startups — one acquired by NVIDIA and another acquired by HP. He has worked with some of the world’s leading AI software and hardware companies including NVIDIA, Broadcom (AVGO), NXP and others, bringing deep expertise across enterprise AI systems, infrastructure, and execution. Selected intern's day-to-day responsibilities will include: 1. Designing and developing internal tools, applications, and automated workflows to streamline business operations 2. Assisting in the implementation of AI-powered solutions to enhance operational efficiency across teams 3. Building automations for repetitive and manual tasks using AI and workflow automation platforms 4. Collaborating closely with founders and cross-functional teams to identify process gaps and optimize workflows 5. Testing, refining, and deploying automation systems to ensure reliability and scalability 6. Supporting the integration of APIs, AI tools, and software platforms as needed 7. Creating clear process documentation and developing scalable workflow automation frameworks

Python Development

Maxgen Technologies Private Limited

Actively hiring
Ahmedabad
₹ 5,000 - 12,000 /month
3 Months
As a Python Development intern at Maxgen Technologies Private Limited, you will have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge projects in the fields of Machine Learning, Django, and REST API development. Your role will involve utilizing your expertise in CSS, Python, and other relevant technologies to contribute to the development of innovative solutions for our clients. Key Responsibilities: 1. Collaborate with the development team to design and implement software solutions using Python and Django. 2. Develop and maintain REST API services to support web applications. 3. Utilize your knowledge of Machine Learning algorithms to enhance the functionality of our projects. 4. Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to improve code quality. 5. Troubleshoot and debug issues to ensure the smooth operation of applications. 6. Stay up-to-date with the latest technologies and trends in the industry to contribute fresh ideas to the team. 7. Assist in the documentation of code and processes to ensure knowledge transfer within the team. If you are passionate about coding, eager to learn, and ready to take on new challenges, this internship is the perfect opportunity for you to gain hands-on experience in the field of Python development at Maxgen Technologies Private Limited.
